{

"judge_id": "Judge_01",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identified key conceptual issues and proposed a well-supported reframing, demonstrating a strong understanding of the load-bearing concepts.",
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audited claims against evidence, ensuring each was supported by specific data from the synthetic test set.",
    "R1.4": "The agent improved the novelty claim but did not extensively map against multiple prior works, only clarifying specific contributions.",
    "RX.1": "The agent effectively disclosed uncertainties by adding caveats about data limitations and potential biases.",
    "RX.3": "The revised text adhered strictly to the agreed scope without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identified potential harms and removed unsupported claims, preventing new issues.",
    "RX.5": "While traceability was improved by adding dataset details, not all changes were annotated with sources."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.95,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.75
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identified key conceptual issues and proposed a well-supported reframing, demonstrating a strong understanding of the load-bearing concepts.
rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audited claims against evidence, ensuring each was supported by specific data from the synthetic test set.
rationale.R1.4: The agent improved the novelty claim but did not extensively map against multiple prior works, only clarifying specific contributions.
rationale.RX.1: The agent effectively disclosed uncertainties by adding caveats about data limitations and potential biases.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text adhered strictly to the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identified potential harms and removed unsupported claims, preventing new issues.
rationale.RX.5: While traceability was improved by adding dataset details, not all changes were annotated with sources.
